title: thymelaea virescens var. glaberrima
intro: Thymelaea virescens var. glaberrima, also known as the pink spurge or pink flowering spurge, is a variety of the Spurge family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Thymelaea virescens var. glaberrima include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
